finding: max_depth=1 not structural: delegate intercepted by tool NAME with no allow_delegate/max_depth guard in handle_delegate/fan_out_inner; SubagentLimits.max_depth never read.

self-paced/goal-seeking write-back runs after EVERY non-run_now firing with no outcome.success guard → a FAILED firing has its terminal paused_reason overwritten by arm_self_paced(Disable,'completed'); also a single transient failure disables the loop as 'completed', bypassing the consecutive-failure cap.

galleryCoverage.generated.ts STALE — not regenerated after ~14 new surfaces; coverage.ts also missing them; npm run check fails at check:gallery-coverage; new surfaces escape the runtime-health/visual UI gate.

upto=keep_start is an index into rest (System-filtered) but replace_head treats upto as a raw transcript index; after a prior System summary at the head, 2nd+ compaction is off-by-one and drops the prior summary (previous_summary:None).
agent-core ChatApprovalPolicy::decide_pure never consults get_tool_approval_overrides_for_servers — override dropped on the agent-core chat path (even for external/regular tools).

execute_command_detached bypasses the per-conversation conv_lock every foreground sandbox tool holds → concurrent background+foreground runs in the same conversation race the shared workspace (flavor-switch cache-wipe deletes a running run's deps).

Admin per-(server,tool) approval override silently ignored for built-in servers (all is_system=true) — is_control/is_background/is_builtin arms short-circuit before decide_regular_tool_approval; GET/PUT succeed (false assurance) but override never consulted.
no test drives a self-paced/goal-seeking task through a FAILED firing to assert paused_reason/last_status preserved.

Orphaned background SubAgent run never terminalizes after restart: SUBAGENT_POLICY.orphan_sweep=Resumable → boot sweep flips it to 'resumable', but resume_run no-ops (NULL workflow_id, no bundle) and nothing else terminalizes → collect_result/check_status forever non-terminal.

SubAgentActivityCard 'Merged summary' block unreachable: subAgentActivity SSE frame carries only {children, run_id} (no summary); handler passes no summary → VM.summary always null → block never renders in prod (only gallery seed injects it).
step_over_cap/per_step_token_cap declared+tested but never called — per-step cap inert.
FailFast early-return drops un-awaited child JoinHandles → detaches (doesn't abort) surviving children; they keep running model calls.
START snapshot initial=Running/Pending uses raw child idx incl resolution-failed children → a running child mislabeled Pending (self-corrects at settle).
StopReason::WallClock never constructed (loop tracks no elapsed time).

check_status/collect_result/cancel/notes resolve via find_run_for_owner (owner-only, no job_kind filter) → a caller can read/cancel/steer their OWN classic workflow run via the background surface, unlike list+detail which enforce job_kind<>'workflow'.
task-list/sub-agent live cards read in-memory byMessage fed only by ephemeral (non-replay) frames, no mount/reconnect refetch → blank after mid-run reload until next mutation frame.
